tweets.author: @drfoo
tweets.text: NCT04567890 (PRESTIGE-PSMA): 177Lu-PSMA-617 + ARPI vs ARPI in mCRPC, primary endpoint rPFS HR 0.41 (95% CI 0.29-0.57, p<0.001). OS interim HR 0.81, not yet significant. Practice-changing.

tweets.author: @drbar
tweets.text: ARANOTE: enzalutamide + ADT in mHSPC shows median rPFS NR vs 22.4mo for placebo + ADT. HR 0.55. OS data immature. NCT04146091.

tweets.author: @drbaz
tweets.text: EMBARK final OS: enzalutamide + leuprolide vs leuprolide alone in nmCRPC with rising PSA. OS HR 0.76, median NR vs NR. Survival benefit confirmed.

tweets.author: @drqux
tweets.text: TROPiCS-02 long-term: sacituzumab govitecan in HR+/HER2- metastatic breast cancer post-CDK4/6. Updated OS HR 0.79, median 14.5 vs 11.2 mo. PMID: 36912345 for original readout.

tweets.author: @droct
tweets.text: DESTINY-Breast06: trastuzumab deruxtecan in HER2-low metastatic breast cancer post-endocrine therapy. PFS 13.2 vs 8.1mo, HR 0.62. NCT04494425. doi:10.1056/NEJMoa2406909

tweets.author: @drhep
tweets.text: Quick correction on the morning session: ARANOTE rPFS was reported with shorter median follow-up than ARASENS. Cross-trial comparisons unwise.

tweets.author: @drfoo
tweets.text: Subgroup analysis of PRESTIGE-PSMA shows consistent rPFS benefit across PSMA SUVmax quartiles. No clear cutoff for selection beyond positive PSMA PET. NCT04567890.

tweets.author: @drion
tweets.text: Discussion: with 177Lu-PSMA + ARPI showing this magnitude of benefit, where does this fit relative to docetaxel and triplet therapy? Sequencing questions remain open.
